name: Mother's Pecan Butter Balls (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine dry ingredients and work in butter and vanilla. Add nuts and mix well.
3. Shape into 1-inch balls.
4. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 325°F for about 25 minutes.
5. Roll in granulated or powdered sugar while warm.
6. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper.
